given: a warehouse operator on the record-stock screen
then: the form is displayed with fields for the SKU, the physical location, the quantity, and the combined inventory_code, and a control to file the record
architectural_notes: E2E: the record-stock screen is a React SPA page under client/src/pages that renders the SKU, location, quantity, and inventory_code fields plus the file control; no server round-trip is asserted here, so it exercises only the client boundary (renders_via: react). Owner module: the client stock-record form component/page; the JSON API boundary (app/routes/) is not yet hit. No business rule or persistence is touched; cross-cutting input validation is owned at the API boundary (app/routes/) and mirrored inline in the client, never in the domain. The field set aligns with PI2 (sku, location, quantity, inventory_code are the NOT NULL columns a filed record must carry).
